overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a makeshift campfire gathering on an urban rooftop at night, set against a futuristic cyberpunk skyline with illuminated twin towers. The static camera captures characters moving around the bonfire, with industrial wind turbines visible on the rooftop perimeter.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on an urban rooftop where a group of characters gather around a central bonfire. The warm firelight illuminates the immediate area while the cool blue glow of a futuristic city skyline dominates the background. Characters move casually around the space, with one walking across the foreground and others seated on benches, creating an atmospheric cyberpunk setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric moment on an urban rooftop where the warmth of a communal fire contrasts with a cold, futuristic cityscape. It begins with a focus on a group of characters gathered around a central bonfire, their forms flickering in the orange glow against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers. As the characters move casually through the space, one figure crosses the foreground while others remain seated on benches, grounding the scene in a lived-in urban reality. The composition then settles into a balance between the intimate light of the campfire and the dominant, cool blue illumination of the cyberpunk skyline.
